envVars.name: SIMMER_API_KEY
envVars.description: Your Simmer SDK API key from simmer.markets/dashboard.

envVars.name: SOLANA_PRIVATE_KEY
envVars.description: Optional. Required only for live Kalshi self-custody trading.

envVars.name: WALLET_PRIVATE_KEY
envVars.description: Optional. Required only for external-wallet Polymarket setups.

envVars.name: TRADING_VENUE
envVars.description: Trading venue: sim, kalshi, or polymarket. Default: sim.

envVars.name: RUN_MODE
envVars.description: Execution mode: manual or auto. Default: manual.

envVars.name: MARKET_QUERY
envVars.description: Optional discovery query. Default: empty string.

envVars.name: MAX_MARKETS
envVars.description: Maximum number of discovered markets to inspect. Default: 50.

envVars.name: CANDIDATE_LIMIT
envVars.description: How many ranked candidates to show. Default: 5.

envVars.name: FAIR_PROBABILITY
envVars.description: Fair YES probability used for side choice and sizing. Default: 0.55.

envVars.name: MIN_EDGE
envVars.description: Minimum edge required before trading. Default: 0.03.

envVars.name: MAX_SLIPPAGE_PCT
envVars.description: Skip trades when estimated slippage exceeds this threshold. Default: 0.15.

envVars.name: SIMMER_ENABLE_LIVE
envVars.description: Set to true to permit live order placement. Default: false.

envVars.name: SELECT_CANDIDATE
envVars.description: Optional 1-based candidate index to trade in non-interactive runs.

envVars.name: AUTO_CONFIRM_LIVE
envVars.description: Explicit override for auto mode with live execution on kalshi or polymarket. Default: false.
